name: Toesca S.A. Administradora General De Fondos - Toesca Renta Residencial Fondo De Inversion
summary: Toesca S.A. Administradora General De Fondos - Toesca Renta Residencial Fondo De Inversion is a residential real estate income fund. It is managed by Toesca S.A. Administradora General De Fondos and focuses on generating returns through investments in income-producing residential real estate properties.
